texto: I am afraid of those who are too simple on the outside
autor: for their vanities they wear upon their hearts. Better to meet a person who wears their vanities out in the open where you can see them! Than one who hides them in their hearts! For it is the stuff of the heart that is hidden
explicacao: Citação de for their vanities they wear upon their hearts. Better to meet a person who wears their vanities out in the open where you can see them! Than one who hides them in their hearts! For it is the stuff of the heart that is hidden sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “I am afraid of those who are too simple on the outside” articula motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
